input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.6
            TITLE: late submission

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.6: Late Submission
S.3.6 Late Submission 
Penalties for Late Submission of Cost Report will be imposed as given in section DR - 
Document Requirements.

final_answer: rule S.3.6: Late Submission Penalties for Late Submission of Cost Report will be imposed as given in section DR - Document Requirements.
